# LaventeCare Frontend — AI context

Current stack: Astro 7.1, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, Node.js 22.12+, Vercel SSR and LaventeCareAuthSystems through a same-origin BFF.

## Non-negotiable boundaries

- Read `docs/INDEX.md` before treating old Markdown reports as current truth.
- Browser requests use relative `/api/...` URLs. Do not add a direct browser-to-auth path.
- `PUBLIC_API_URL` is a pure origin. Never add a fallback tenant or fallback backend.
- The configured tenant overwrites any client `X-Tenant-ID` header.
- Use auth policy `public` for public endpoints so a 401 cannot trigger refresh.
- Treat refresh 400/401/403 as invalid credentials; treat network/429/5xx as temporary availability failures and preserve the session.
- Contact retries keep the same request ID until business fields change.
- Do not reintroduce exact performance, uptime, traffic, revenue or conversion claims without an attached primary measurement source.
- Public identity is LaventeCare, KVK 88162710, tagline “Van idee tot werkend systeem”. Do not use “Lavente Care V.O.F.”, KVK 94908427 or “Chip tot Cloud”.

## Structure

```text
src/components/ui       static primitives
src/components/blocks   page sections
src/components/islands  interactive React
src/layouts             shared document layout
src/lib                 API, runtime config, i18n, security
src/pages               routes and BFF endpoints
tests                   Playwright tests
```

## Required checks

Run formatting, ESLint, `astro check`, Playwright and the production build. For visual changes, start the dev server and verify desktop/mobile layout, console output, navigation and the real interaction path.
